title: Easy Eula
description: Allows you to agree to the minecraft EULA in console rather than restarting the server!
body: [![Maintenance](https://img.shields.io/badge/Maintained%3F-yes-green.svg)](https://GitHub.com/Naereen/StrapDown.js/graphs/commit-activity) [![PRs Welcome](https://img.shields.io/badge/PRs-welcome-brightgreen.svg?style=flat-square)](http://makeapullrequest.com) [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/G2G4DZF4D) # Easy Eula A tiny minecraft mod that allows you to agree to the minecraft EULA in console rather than restarting the server! # For Developers You can include this mod into your projects build.gradle file for convenience when developing with minecraft servers. ```gradle repositories { maven { url "https://api.modrinth.com/maven" } } dependencies { modImplementation("maven.modrinth:easy-eula:1.1.0-fabric") // Or -forge } ``` If extra functionality is required, the Eula can also be accepted in code via: ```java EasyEula.acceptEula(); ``` This is especially useful for test mods that run in automated environments.
